name: Square Terminal
description: Accept card-present payments using Square Terminal readers via cloud API. Push payments to Square hardware from your POS.
author: Spwig

supported_readers.name: Square Terminal
supported_readers.description: All-in-one countertop terminal with touchscreen and receipt printer

supported_readers.name: Square Reader
supported_readers.description: Compact contactless and chip card reader

access_token.label: Access Token
access_token.help_text: Your Square access token. Generate in the Square Developer Dashboard under OAuth or API keys.

environment.label: Environment
environment.help_text: Use 'sandbox' for development, 'production' for live payments.

location_id.label: Location ID
location_id.help_text: Your Square location ID. Required to associate terminals with a location.

changes: Initial release with Square Terminal API cloud support
Cloud-based payment initiation via Terminal Checkouts API
Support for Square Terminal and Square Reader hardware

pricing_info.notes: Square charges 2.6% + $0.10 per card-present transaction. No monthly fees.

regions.notes: Available in US, Canada, UK, Ireland, Australia, Japan, France, and Spain.
